metadata.title: Privacy Policy
metadata.description: NADZ Healthcare is committed to protecting your privacy and personal information. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your data.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: NADZ Healthcare is committed to protecting your privacy and personal information.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.content: NADZ Healthcare ("we," "us," "our") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal and health related data when you use our website or services. This policy describes how we collect, use, share, retain, and protect your information in compliance with UAE data protection requirements.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.intro: We may collect the following types of data when you use our site or services:
items: Personal identification data: name, date of birth, contact number, email address, address or location
Health and medical data: health history, current conditions, lab/test results, treatment and wellness data for home care, physician on call, labs-at-home, wellness and physiotherapy services
Service booking and appointment data: requested service, preferred location (home, hotel, office), schedule, consent details
Payment, billing, or invoicing information if you book paid services
Website usage data: IP address, browser type, device info, cookies (see Cookie Policy)

sections.title: Purpose of Processing
sections.intro: We process your data for the following purposes:
items: To provide home healthcare, doctor on call, nursing, labs at home, wellness, physiotherapy, and other medical services
To schedule, manage, and follow up appointments and care plans
To communicate with you, including notifications, reminders, results, and follow ups
For billing and payment processing when applicable
To maintain records for continuity of care, regulatory compliance, and internal quality control
To analyse usage of our website and improve our services, subject to your consent

sections.title: Data Sharing and Third Parties
sections.intro: Your data might be shared with:
items: Licensed practitioners, nurses, lab staff, physiotherapists involved in your care
Service providers such as labs, diagnostic services, payment processors, and CRM systems under contractual agreement
Regulatory or government authorities if required by law or medical regulation for reporting purposes

sections.title: Data Retention
sections.content: We retain your personal and medical records for at least 25 years to comply with applicable healthcare record keeping obligations, then securely dispose of or anonymize as appropriate.

sections.title: Your Rights
items: Request access to your personal or medical data we hold
Request deletion of data where legally permissible
Withdraw consent for processing for non-essential processing at any time
Ask for a copy of your data or request how your data is processed

sections.title: Security Measures
sections.content: We implement reasonable administrative, technical, and physical safeguards including controlled access, encrypted transmission or storage where applicable, and staff confidentiality commitments to minimize risk of unauthorized access or disclosure.

sections.title: Contact Information
sections.intro: If you have questions or requests about your data, please contact our Data Protection Officer or Privacy Contact at:

sections.title: Updates to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. The "Last Updated" date will reflect revisions. Continued use of the site or services after updates constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.

questionsSection.title: Questions About Your Privacy?
questionsSection.description: Our team is available to help you with any questions about our privacy practices or your data rights.
